revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月廿四]][[zh:八月廿四]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 24|qq=August 24}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 24''' is the 24rd day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 8 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} September 16, 1511) - {{ill|Battle of Funaokayama|ja|船岡山合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Funaokayama|1=Battle of Funaokayama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11614043}} : Former Shogun {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshitane|en|Ashikaga Yoshitane|qid=Q708527|lt=Ashikaga Yoshitane|1=Ashikaga Yoshitane}} , who fled to {{ill|Tanba Province|en|Tanba Province|qid=Q954511|lt=Tanba Province|1=Tanba Province}} fearing the advance of {{ill|Hosokawa Masakata|ja|細川政賢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Masakata|1=Hosokawa Masakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11605904}} towards Kyoto, defeats Masakata with the support of {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshioki|en|Ōuchi Yoshioki|qid=Q909270|lt=Ōuchi Yoshioki|1=Ōuchi Yoshioki}} and others, reclaiming Kyoto. * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 1 (Julian calendar September 23, 1532) - {{ill|Attack on Yamashina Hongan-ji|ja|山科本願寺焼き打ち|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Attack on Yamashina Hongan-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} : The {{ill|Hokke-ikki|en|Hokke-ikki|qid=Q11555311|lt=Hokke Uprising|1=Hokke-ikki}} of Kyoto townspeople attacks the temple with the support of the {{ill|Rokkaku clan|en|Rokkaku clan|qid=Q2975342|lt=Rokkaku clan|1=Rokkaku clan}} . == Births == * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|qid=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} September 20, 1677) - {{ill|Mōri Yoshimoto|ja|毛利吉元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Yoshimoto|1=Mōri Yoshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11547584}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q876267}} (+1731) * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1193910}} 5 (Gregorian calendar October 6, 1776) - {{ill|Hirata Atsutane|en|Hirata Atsutane|qid=Q2572749|lt=Hirata Atsutane|1=Hirata Atsutane}} , {{ill|Kokugaku scholar|ja|Kokugakuist|1=Kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugaku scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q855159}} (+1843) == Deaths == * Eishō 8 (Julian calendar September 16, 1511) - Hosokawa Masakata, {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (* unknown birth year) * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 (Gregorian calendar October 8, 1594) - {{ill|Ishikawa Goemon|en|Ishikawa Goemon|qid=Q707279|lt=Ishikawa Goemon|1=Ishikawa Goemon}} , notorious {{ill|Banditry|en|Banditry|qid=Q10968653|lt=thief|1=Banditry}} (*1558) * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1 (Gregorian calendar October 16, 1615) - {{ill|Shimai Sōshitsu|ja|島井宗室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimai Sōshitsu|1=Sōshitsu Shimai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11476199}} , {{ill|merchant|ja|Merchant|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/merchant|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (*1539) == Holidays and Annual Events ==
== See Also == {{Old Japanese Calendar Navigation|8|23|8|25|7|24|9|8|0824|qq=}} {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|23|8|25|7|24|9|8|0824|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 8월 24일]] [[ja:8月24日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月廿四]]
